title: Interviews with Employees and Entrepreneurs in the Private Sports and Physical Activity Sector 2016-2017
description: This dataset consists of interviews with employees and entrepreneurs in the private sports and physical activity sector in Finland. The data were collected as part of the Uuden työn sukupuolistavat käytännöt ja sopimisen muodot project (2016-2018), funded by the Finnish Work Environment Fund. First, the entrepreneurs were asked about the history, current state, branding, and prospects of their company. The employees were asked about their daily work routines and experiences of success or failure
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
